get.description: Check if job backend is available.

schema.title: Response Check Job Backend Availability V2 Concept  Concept Id  Job Availability Get
Response Get Jobs List V2 Concept  Concept Id  Job Get

post.description:
Create a new requirement job.

Stores an initial RUNNING ConceptJobRecord in the concept immediately
(as a PartType.JOB part), then updates it with the output URL once the
solver finishes. Returns the stored record so the caller has the part id.

delete.description: Delete a job from the backend.

get.description:
Retrieve a job output file.

For local backends the file bytes are streamed directly.  For remote
backends (e.g. HPS/S3) a 307 redirect to a presigned download URL is
returned instead.
Get a concept by ID from the database.

put.description: Update an existing concept in the database.

delete.description: Delete a concept from the database.

post.description: Create a new concept in the database.

Save a concept to a specified file path (filesystem backend only).

Copies the ``.cev`` archive to the given path, re-registers the concept
at that location, and sets ``save_state`` to ``SaveState.SAVED``.

get.description: Get file metadata for a concept.

put.description: Update an existing file for a concept.

delete.description: Delete a file from a concept.

post.description: Upload a new file for a concept.

get.description: Get a specific part from a concept.

schema.title: Response Get Concept Part V2 Concept  Id   Part Type   Part Id  Get

put.description: Update an existing part within a concept.

schema.title: Response Update Concept Part V2 Concept  Id   Part Type   Part Id  Put

delete.description: Delete a part from a concept.

post.description: Create a new part within a concept.

schema.title: Response Create Concept Part V2 Concept  Id   Part Type  Post

post.description:
Open a .cev concept file and load it into the file-system database.

Reads the concept ID from inside the file so the filename can be any
human-readable name rather than the UUID.  Registers the path so all
subsequent operations resolve the correct location without requiring
another open call.  Multiple files in different directories can be
registered independently.

Note: This endpoint is only meaningful when the file-system backend is
active.  It is registered unconditionally so the route exists regardless
of which backend was configured at import time (important for tests that
swap configs via fixtures).

Get graph data for a component.

Supported component types:

- **MotorLab** — returns ``LossMapGridLab`` or ``LossMapGridPower``
- **BatteryLookupTable** — returns ``BatteryLookupTableData``
- **TransmissionLossCoefficients** — returns ``LossMapGridTorque``

Args:
    id: The concept ID.
    part_id: The component part ID.
    database: Injected database dependency.
    unit_choices: Injected unit-choice dependency.
    extra_args: Optional loss-map calculation arguments (speed, voltage…).

Returns:
    A display-data object in user units.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: If the component or its associated file is not found.
    HTTPException 422: If the component type does not support display data.

schema.title: Response Get Display Data V2 Concept  Id  Component  Part Id  Get Display Data Post

get.description: Get table of units for frontend generation.

schema.title: Response Get Info Unit Choices Info Get

BatteryConfiguration.title: BatteryConfiguration
BatteryConfiguration.description: Configuration that can change characteristics of the battery.

BatteryLookupTableData.title: BatteryLookupTableData
BatteryLookupTableData.description: Data for a lookup table battery.

BatteryState.title: BatteryState
BatteryState.description: Variables that define state of a battery.

ComponentLossMapArgs.title: ComponentLossMapArgs
ComponentLossMapArgs.description:
Args for create component loss maps.

Allows unit transforming.

ConceptInput.title: ConceptInput
ConceptInput.description: Concept input — uses input variants of each part group.

ConceptJobRecord.title: ConceptJobRecord
ConceptJobRecord.description:
A job record stored as a part inside a concept.

Tracks backend job status and the output file URLs written by the solver.
Stored under PartType.JOB so it uses the same CRUD path as all other parts.

ConceptOutput.title: ConceptOutput
ConceptOutput.description: Concept output with database ID — uses output variants of each part group.

ConceptSaveRequest.title: ConceptSaveRequest
ConceptSaveRequest.description: Request body for the save-concept endpoint.

DriveCycleInput.title: DriveCycleInput
DriveCycleInput.description:
Drive Cycle Input.

Upload the raw drive cycle data (CSV or JSON export from the solver) as a
file first, then create a ``DriveCycleInput`` referencing that file via
``drive_cycle_data_id``.  The ``points`` field is excluded from storage.

DriveCycleOutput.title: DriveCycleOutput
DriveCycleOutput.description:
Drive Cycle Output.

The raw time-series data (``points``) is stored in a separate file
referenced by ``drive_cycle_data_id``, mirroring the pattern used by
:class:`~src.v2.models.components.MotorLabOutput`.  The ``points`` field
is excluded from the concept record so that large point arrays do not bloat
the concept JSON.

FileItemCreateResponse.title: FileItemCreateResponse
FileItemCreateResponse.description:
Response from creating a file item.

Includes any calculated values extracted from the file.

FileItemInput.title: FileItemInput
FileItemInput.description: File Item Input — metadata supplied when registering a stored file.

JobRequest.title: JobRequest
JobRequest.description: Request body for creating a job.

LossMapGridLab.title: LossMapGridLab
LossMapGridLab.description:
Used for Lab motors if no efficiency map included in the .lab file.

Losses for plotted with current/phase advance or current/slip.

LossMapGridPowerMetaData.title: LossMapGridPowerMetaData
LossMapGridPowerMetaData.description: Meta-data for efficiency maps that have been calculated in Lab.

MotorConfiguration.title: MotorConfiguration
MotorConfiguration.description: Configuration that can change characteristics of the motor.

MotorLabData.title: MotorLabData
MotorLabData.description:
Motor Lab Data.

Model is held as a dict, exported from Lab.

MotorState.title: MotorState
MotorState.description:
Variables that define state of a motor.

Essentially these are mostly all inputs to a Lab operating point calculation.

SaveState.title: SaveState
SaveState.description:
Persistence state of a concept on the filesystem.

``UNSAVED`` — concept was created in this session and has never been
written to a user-chosen path (the default for new concepts).

``SAVED`` — concept has been explicitly saved to a known path.

Extending example: add ``MODIFIED`` here when tracking unsaved edits
to an already-saved concept ("dirty" state).

SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs.title: SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs
SurfaceConditionTractionConfigs.description: Surface conditions that affect the traction coefficient.

ThermalModel.title: ThermalModel
ThermalModel.description:
Thermal model.

Contains the thermal network defined by nodes and edges, and mappings of which nodes
correspond to which losses and temperatures.

ThermalNetwork.title: ThermalNetwork
ThermalNetwork.description:
Lumped parameter thermal network.

It is constructed from sets of nodes and edges (connections) at different speeds
and flow rates.

Fields:
    speed_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to speed values.
    flow_rate_dict (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to flow rate values.
    edges (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to edge lists.
    nodes (dict): Dictionary mapping indices to node lists.

UnitChoices.title: UnitChoices
UnitChoices.description:
Unit Choice for the analysis.

We might not need all of these.
We might want to create preset groups of these (eg. MKS, Imperial ect)

WheelRollingResistanceConfigs.title: WheelRollingResistanceConfigs
WheelRollingResistanceConfigs.description: Condition on wheels which affect the rolling resistance coefficient.
